headline: Grupo
PALENKKE
Global
hero.description: Grupo Palenkke: Mexican company specialized in brand development, commercialization, product incubation and national/international expansion.
hero.cta_brand: Take Your Brand to the Next Level

about.heading: Grupo PALENKKE
about.p1:
Grupo PALENKKE was born with the vision of connecting tradition and cultural identity as cultural heritage in an era of constant change, toward national and international global commercial expansion.

The PALENKKE name represents the value of traditional craftsmanship as cultural heritage, promoting products, knowledge and techniques that are part of the essence of our communities.
about.p2:
Through our experience in national and international retail and market development, we have built commercial relationships focused on sustainable growth, strategic positioning and expansion into new markets.

Today, Grupo PALENKKE functions as a commercial platform oriented toward brand development, product commercialization and national and international opportunity building.

items.title: Brand Development
items.desc: We create and develop own and private brands with commercial vision and strategic positioning.

items.title: Product Incubation
items.desc: We structure products from their origin to prepare them for international markets.

items.title: Commercialization & Distribution
items.desc: We connect products with retail, distributors, specialized stores and strategic sales channels.

items.title: International Expansion
items.desc: We facilitate commercial growth in Mexico, USA, Central America, South America and Asia.

items.title: Market Development
items.desc: We drive strategies focused on positioning, sustainable growth and territorial expansion.

why.heading: Why Grupo PALENKKE?
why.sub:
Grupo PALENKKE differentiates itself by offering an integral solution that combines brand development, commercial expansion, distribution and real market access.

We don't just connect products with sales channels; we build commercial structures designed to grow solidly and sustainably.

We believe in strategic growth based on collaboration, real development and joint opportunity building.

items.title: Access to established commercial channels
items.desc: Consolidated distribution, retail and consumption network across multiple markets.

items.title: International retail experience
items.desc: More than 17 years of trajectory in retail across Mexico, USA, Central America, South America, Asia, Spain and India.

items.title: Own and private brand development
items.desc: We create and position brands with solid identity and strategic commercial vision.

items.title: International commercial expansion
items.desc: Market opening strategies with global vision and local execution.

items.title: Incubation and development model
items.desc: Comprehensive accompaniment from product conception to launch and expansion.

items.title: Long-term strategic relationships
items.desc: Partners, distributors and investors across multiple markets with shared vision.

items.title: Global vision with Mexican identity
items.desc: We combine tradition, strategy and global expansion to build solid projects with identity and international projection.

companies.heading: Brands & Projects
companies.sub:
Grupo PALENKKE participates in the development, positioning and expansion of brands focused on identity, innovation and national/international growth.

Each project represents a strategic vision built on authenticity, quality and global projection.

Our ecosystem integrates brands oriented to premium beverages, creative development, commercial identity and new market opportunities.

items.name: MEZCAL ELIXIR DEL ALMA
items.desc: Discover the authentic flavor of a handmade mezcal with wild cupey, crafted in the lands of Turicato, Michoacán. Each bottle holds centuries of tradition, passion and respect for nature.

items.name: KANAN
items.desc: Brand focused on preserving the cultural value of mezcal through traditional processes and a contemporary vision, with three varieties: joven, rosé and añejo.

items.name: PALENKKE MEZCAL
items.desc: Representation of artisanal tradition, Mexican identity and international commercial expansion, with three varieties: Rosé, Joven and Añejo.

items.name: SAN ROJO
items.desc: Chili liqueur crafted in Querétaro entirely by hand, unique in the world. A tribute to our customs and traditions, capturing the essence of Mexico in every bottle.

items.name: KOLDVOLT
items.desc: Your integral partner for refrigerated delivery vehicles and high-performance solutions for vans and refrigerated trucks up to 28 feet.

items.name: RITEVOLT
items.desc: Company dedicated to research, development, production, sales, service and integration of solar energy equipment.

items.name: HEARTFULCRAFT
items.desc: Brand empowering over 350 artisans in rural India, preserving centuries-old artisanal techniques and creating unique handmade pieces that reach buyers worldwide.

cta_section.sub:

Grupo PALENKKE connects opportunities, markets and international vision.

form.name: Name
form.message_placeholder: Tell us about your project or idea...

nosotros.meta_desc: Learn about the history, mission and team of Grupo Palenkke. More than 17 years driving brands toward global success.
nosotros.hero_heading: More Than 17 Years Building Commercial Bridges
nosotros.hero_sub: From Mexico to the world, with experience, vision and commitment in international markets.
nosotros.historia_p1:
Since our beginnings, we have worked with the vision of building real opportunities within the international market.

The experience acquired in retail, distribution and commercial development has allowed us to participate in projects focused on growth, expansion and strategic positioning in different territories.
nosotros.historia_p2:
Each project has strengthened our experience in commercial expansion, international retail and market development.

We started with an idea, with a vision, and we continue building a platform focused on global growth and real opportunities.
nosotros.vision_p1:
Our vision is to build an international commercial structure capable of developing products and brands with sustainable growth potential.

We believe in commercial relationships based on trust, loyalty, communication and shared vision.
nosotros.vision_p2: We don't just seek to distribute products; we seek to build solid brands with permanence, identity and international expansion.
nosotros.mision_text: Drive the growth of brands and producers through comprehensive commercial strategies, strategic alliances and international expansion, generating real and sustainable value.

valores.title: Human Quality
valores.desc: Human quality is one of the most important elements in the development of each project.

valores.title: Real Relationships
valores.desc: We believe that solid businesses are built through real relationships, trust, communication and shared vision.

valores.title: Identity & Growth
valores.desc: Each brand represents an opportunity to preserve identity, generate growth and build something lasting.

valores.title: Experience & Strategy
valores.desc: Grupo PALENKKE combines experience, tradition and strategy to drive projects with authentic value and international projection.

nosotros.equipo_sub: A team with international experience, passion for business and commitment to the success of each project.
nosotros.cta_sub: Join the Grupo Palenkke ecosystem and take your brand to the next level.

servicios.meta_desc: Brand development, incubation, commercialization and international expansion. Comprehensive services to boost your business.
servicios.hero_sub: From conception to international expansion, we accompany every stage of your project.
servicios.methodology_sub: A structured and proven approach to ensure results.
servicios.cta_sub: Schedule a free initial consultation and discover how we can help you grow.

casos.meta_desc: Discover how Grupo Palenkke has driven brands like ELIXIR DEL ALMA, KANAN, Palenkke Mezcal, SAN ROJO, KOLDVOLT, RITEVOLT and HeartfulCraft toward global success.

productos.meta_desc: Discover Mezcal Elixír del Alma: artisanal tradition, Mexican identity and international commercial expansion.
productos.hero_sub: Artisanal mezcal made in Mexico under traditional processes that respect the origin and quality of agave.
productos.about_heading: The Story Behind Mezcal Elixír del Alma
productos.about_p1: Mezcal Elixír del Alma is born from the passion for traditional Mexican craftsmanship and respect for agave as cultural heritage.
productos.about_p2: Each bottle represents hours of artisanal work, from agave selection to final distillation in copper stills.

contacto.meta_desc: Contact us to explore business opportunities, strategic alliances or international distribution.
contacto.hero_sub: We are open to developing commercial relationships with producers, brands, distributors and investors.

legal.meta_desc: Partnership opportunities with Grupo Palenkke: distribution alliances, retail collaborations and more.
legal.hero_sub:
Discover the essence of Mexico with Grupo PALENKKE, created with passion and tradition.

Take your brand to the next level and join us to celebrate the spirit of Mexico by exploring partnership opportunities with Grupo PALENKKE.

From distribution to retail, together we can open new possibilities and build lasting success.

items.title: Distribution Alliances
items.desc:
Expand your portfolio with Grupo PALENKKE's exclusive resources and products.

Partner with us to distribute our premium products in international markets.

Benefit from our commitment to quality, authenticity and tradition, and together let's bring the legacy of our Mexican artisans to new markets and consumers around the world.

items.title: Retail Collaborations
items.desc:
Elevate your retail experience alongside Grupo PALENKKE.

Showcase our products in your commercial spaces and offer your customers the opportunity to discover the flavors, identity and essence of Mexico.

Collaborate with us to develop exclusive promotions, activations and unique commercial experiences that connect with your consumers.

items.title: Brand Ambassador Program
items.desc:
Join Grupo PALENKKE as a brand ambassador.

Share your passion for our products and become a key representative of our brand or even your own brand within our commercial ecosystem.

Enjoy exclusive benefits while helping expand the essence and experience of Grupo PALENKKE to new communities and markets.

items.title: Event Sponsorship
items.desc:
Connect your brand with the experience and presence of Grupo PALENKKE through exclusive sponsorships.

From festivals to private events and premium experiences, our products can elevate the guest experience and generate a memorable impact.

Explore personalized sponsorship opportunities designed to position your brand in dynamic, attractive and high commercial value environments.

items.title: Personalized Partnerships
items.desc:
Do you have a unique collaboration idea?

We are open to exploring personalized partnerships that align with the values and vision of Grupo PALENKKE.

Whether through co-branded products, promotional campaigns or immersive experiences, let's work together to transform ideas into new opportunities for mutual growth.

legal.cta_text: For more information about collaboration opportunities with Grupo PALENKKE, contact us.
legal.cta_closing: Let's embark together on this exciting experience and celebrate the essence of Grupo PALENKKE.
legal.form_sub: Complete the form and our team will get in touch with you within 24 hours.
